message:
fix: handle truncated LLM responses (finish_reason: length)

When the LLM hits max_tokens mid-tool-call, the response gets
truncated and tool arguments are incomplete (e.g. missing 'goal').
Now detects finish_reason=length with tool calls and sends error
tool results telling the LLM to break the task into smaller steps.

Also bumps default max_tokens from 4096 to 16384 to reduce
truncation frequency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
